components.label: Current Technology Infrastructure
components.description: Assessment of the existing technology stack, including servers, databases, and frameworks used in the monolithic e-commerce platform.

components.label: Microservices Architecture Design
components.description: Design principles and patterns for implementing a microservices architecture, including service decomposition, communication protocols, and data management.

components.label: Migration Strategy Development
components.description: Strategies for transitioning from the monolithic architecture to microservices, including phased migration, parallel running, and rollback plans.

components.label: Performance and Scalability Evaluation
components.description: Analysis of how the new microservices architecture will impact performance and scalability compared to the current system.

components.label: Security Considerations
components.description: Assessment of security implications of migrating to microservices, including data protection, service authentication, and API security.

components.label: Team Readiness and Training
components.description: Evaluation of the current team's skills and training needs for adopting microservices architecture and related technologies.

gaps: Impact on customer experience during migration
Integration with third-party services and APIs

overlaps.description: Both components may cover aspects of service design that affect performance.
